title: The Blood Sugar and Hormone Connection After 40: What You Need to Know
seo_title: Blood Sugar and Hormone Connection After 40: What to Know
meta_description: Blood sugar dysregulation worsens hormonal symptoms after 40. Learn how insulin, cortisol, and estrogen are interconnected and what you can do about it.
